title: Katary Falls
tagline: Katary Falls — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Katary Falls is approximately 10 km from Coonoor in the Nilgiris district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Katary Falls is approximately 10 km from Coonoor in the Nilgiris district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. At 55 metres (180 ft) in height, Katary Falls is third largest waterfall in the Nilgiris; one can reach it by trecking. The falls are the site of India's first hydel power plant, the Kateri hydroelectric system.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Adikaratti
topPlaces.description: Adikaratti is a panchayat town in the Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Hubbathala
topPlaces.description: Hubbathala is a census town in the Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Athigaratty
topPlaces.description: Athigaratty (also known as Adigaratty) is a hamlet located in the Nilgiri Hills in the state of Tamil Nadu. One of the largest villages in the Nilgirs South India with over 800 households.

topPlaces.name: Aruvankadu
topPlaces.description: Aruvankadu is a big village located in The Nilgiris District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between Coonoor and Ooty on the NH 67, 6 km from Coonoor town and 12 km from Ooty.

topPlaces.name: Hullickal
topPlaces.description: Hullickal or Pulikkal is a Revenue Village in Coonoor Taluk of the Nilgiris District, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Nilgiri Mountains
topPlaces.description: The Nilgiri Mountains, also known as the Nilgiris, are a mountain range at the junction of the Eastern and Western Ghats ranges in South India. Spanning the states of Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, and Kerala, the range forms part of a 56 km (35 mi)-long and 32 km (20 mi)-wide plateau.

topPlaces.name: Jegathala
topPlaces.description: Jegathala is a village in Nilgiris, located at an altitude of 1,850 m (6,070 ft) above sea level. It is 5 km from Coonoor and 13 km from Ooty.

topPlaces.name: Achanakal
topPlaces.description: Achanakal is a Badaga village in the Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is located adjacent to the Coonoor-Ooty highway in the Ketti valley.

items.note: Adikaratti is a panchayat town in the Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Hubbathala is a census town in the Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Athigaratty (also known as Adigaratty) is a hamlet located in the Nilgiri Hills in the state of Tamil Nadu. One of the largest villages in the Nilgirs South India with over 800 households.
Aruvankadu is a big village located in The Nilgiris District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between Coonoor and Ooty on the NH 67, 6 km from Coonoor town and 12 km from Ooty.
Hullickal or Pulikkal is a Revenue Village in Coonoor Taluk of the Nilgiris District, Tamil Nadu, India.

The Nilgiri Mountains, also known as the Nilgiris, are a mountain range at the junction of the Eastern and Western Ghats ranges in South India. Spanning the states of Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, and Kerala, the range forms part of a 56 km (35 mi)-long and 32 km (20 mi)-wide plateau.
Jegathala is a village in Nilgiris, located at an altitude of 1,850 m (6,070 ft) above sea level. It is 5 km from Coonoor and 13 km from Ooty.
Achanakal is a Badaga village in the Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is located adjacent to the Coonoor-Ooty highway in the Ketti valley.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Katary Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Katary Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Katary Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (48 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Katary Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Katary Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Katary Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Katary Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Katary Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adikaratti, Hubbathala, Athigaratty, Aruvankadu, Hullickal.
